name: Crockpot Porridge2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a slow cooker, combine the cracked wheat, oats, water, raisins, wheat germ, apple, and cinnamon.
2. Turn the slow cooker to the lowest setting and cook the porridge overnight.
3. Spoon the cooked porridge into serving bowls.
4. Serve with milk and honey.
